title: Duplicate and move item in another board
excerpt:
Hello, 
Is it possible to create an automation that duplicates a row in a board and directly moves it to another board ? 
The goal is to have the same items (with the same name) in two different boards. 
Thank you,

posts.author: corentin.dalfarra (AB testing)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Is it possible to create an automation that duplicates a row in a board and directly moves it to another board ?

The goal is to have the same items (with the same name) in two different boards.

Thank you,

Corentin
